---
title: "vmap_over_outer"
generated: true
description: "Transform a function to apply to the outer dimensions of a tensor."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.numerics.tensor_ops`](../nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix._internal.util`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:vmap_over_outer -->
```python
vmap_over_outer(f: Callable[..., Any], f_dim: int, align_outer: bool = False) -> Callable[..., Any]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:vmap_over_outer -->
Transform a function to apply to the outer dimensions of a tensor.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:vmap_over_outer -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `f` | `Callable[..., Any]` | — | — | — |
| `f_dim` | `int` | — | — | — |
| `align_outer` | `bool` | — | `False` | — |

**Returns** `Callable[..., Any]`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
